name: compute_breakeven_targets
description: Reverse-solve six hospitality breakeven thresholds (ADR, Occupancy, RevPAR, Going-In Cap, Acquisition Debt Rate, Terminal Cap) where the deal just satisfies the DSCR floor or zero-IRR exit. For each row returns the current value, the breakeven value, the signed gap (current - breakeven), a directional status (above / close / below / N/A), and a one-line reason. ANOI (NOI minus FF&E reserve) is the cash flow used throughout. Inputs come from the engine's stabilized Year-1 figures plus a slope estimate from a small revenue-side perturbation; the terminal cap is interpolated from a small set of pre-sampled (exitCap, IRR) pairs.

currentAdr.description: Current Year-1 starting ADR in dollars

currentGoingInCap.description: Current going-in cap rate as decimal (Year-1 ANOI / purchase price)

currentDebtRate.description: Current acquisition interest rate as decimal

currentTerminalCap.description: Current terminal (exit) cap rate as decimal

baseAnoiAnnual.description: Year-1 ANOI from the engine (NOI minus FF&E reserve)

anoiSlopePerRevenueScale.description: Change in Year-1 ANOI per unit revenue scale (estimated from a +10% startAdr perturbation)

annualDebtService.description: Year-1 annual debt service from the engine

loanAmount.description: Outstanding loan principal used for PMT inversion

termMonths.description: Loan term in months for PMT inversion

purchasePrice.description: Acquisition purchase price for the closed-form going-in cap solve

irrSamples.description: Optional pre-sampled (exitCap, IRR) pairs in ascending exitCap order; used to interpolate the breakeven terminal cap where IRR crosses zero

targetDscrFloor.description: Optional override for the DSCR floor (defaults to BREAKEVEN_TARGET_DSCR_FLOOR)

proximityRatio.description: Optional override for the relative-distance threshold that flags 'close to breakeven' (defaults to BREAKEVEN_PROXIMITY_RATIO)
